title: pilosella incaniformis
intro: Pilosella incaniformis, also known as Hoary Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's leaves and roots have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella incaniformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for different herbal preparations to be used depending on the specific health needs.
